suppress.notes: CVE-2026-42154 is a Prometheus server remote-read API vulnerability. OWASP Dependency-Check incorrectly maps the Java Micrometer registry package pkg:maven/io.micrometer/micrometer-registry-prometheus@1.15.4 to cpe:2.3:a:prometheus:prometheus:1.15.4. This application embeds the Micrometer registry client library, not a Prometheus server and not the vulnerable /api/v1/read server implementation. The suppression is restricted to this exact Maven package/version and this exact CVE. Re-evaluate on every Micrometer upgrade or NVD CPE correction.
